title: E-Commerce Platform
overview: A modern e-commerce solution with seamless checkout, inventory management, and analytics dashboard.
problem: The client needed a scalable e-commerce platform that could handle high traffic and provide a smooth shopping experience.
mission: Build a performant, conversion-optimized online store with real-time inventory sync.
solution: Implemented a React-based storefront with Node.js backend, Stripe integration, and automated inventory management.

title: SaaS Analytics Dashboard
overview: A comprehensive analytics dashboard for tracking key business metrics and user engagement.
problem: The startup needed actionable insights from their user data to drive product decisions.
mission: Create an intuitive dashboard that transforms complex data into clear, actionable visualizations.
solution: Built an interactive React dashboard with real-time data updates and customizable widgets.

title: Travel Booking Platform
overview: An all-in-one travel booking platform with flight, hotel, and experience bookings.
problem: Users needed a unified platform to compare and book travel arrangements without switching between services.
mission: Design a seamless booking experience that simplifies travel planning.
solution: Created a unified booking platform with real-time availability and competitive pricing.

title: Healthcare Patient Portal
overview: A HIPAA-compliant patient portal for managing appointments, medical records, and telehealth.
problem: Healthcare provider needed a secure, accessible way for patients to manage their health information.
mission: Build a compliant, user-friendly portal that improves patient engagement.
solution: Developed a secure React portal with video conferencing and encrypted record storage.
